allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); games=[g for g in data if 'SUGGEST' not in g.get\('name',''\) and 'comments' not in g.get\('name',''\).lower\(\)]; print\(f'Total: {len\(games\)}'\); [print\(f'{i+37}|{g[\\"name\\"]}|{g.get\(\\"url\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) for i,g in enumerate\(games\)]")
